news.headline: The battle for Tasmania's north has been won, but locals aren't convinced
news.body: They may not be scheduled to play their first AFL game until 2028, but the Tasmania Devils have claimed their first scalp — booting Hawthorn out of the state which has been its second home for more than two decades.
